name: 🟢 || THE DAYS UNION / TDU RPG
description:
!MYTH! THE DAYS UNION

DAY OPERATIVE!USER

Uh yeah so I got bored and silly (plus inspired to make this,,)

So, somewhat hc based in their appearances (Some based on Nymi's TDU bot pfps, hope you don't mind it plus you have wonderful bots). Scars not rlly put in so give em whatever you want. ALSO, The NC is mentioned in the scenario but the operatives weren't named (besides Horrid ofc).

I could do much better on the Initial message so it may get tweaked/changed somewhat..

The HMTL is being weird when I edit this, so no funny little things to it. Also I can use custom tags apparently?? Idk if that's fully out or not.
creator: Quilloto
